issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://monkeytype.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmonkeytype.com%2F) ### Comment > The website `https://monkeytype.com/` fails to load when the AdGuard extension is enabled. > > **Key observations:** > 1. **Core Requests Stuck:** In DevTools Network tab, critical requests like `configuration`, and `manifest.json` remain in a `Pending` state indefinitely. > 2. **Filter Log vs. Reality:** Even though the **AdGuard Filtering Log** shows these requests as 200, the browser never actually receives the response, causing the site's initialization logic to hang. > 3. **Not a Filter Issue:** I have tried **disabling all filters** within AdGuard, but the issue persists. The site only functions correctly when the AdGuard extension is **completely disabled/toggled off** in the browser's extension management page. > 4. **Manual Access Works:** If I manually copy and paste the "Pending" URLs into a new tab, they load immediately. > > This seems to be a conflict between the extension's core interception engine and the website's request handling, rather than a specific filtering rule. > > **Steps to reproduce:** > 1. Enable AdGuard Extension (v5.4.3.1). > 2. Open `https://monkeytype.com/`. > 3. Observe the Network tab in DevTools showing multiple `Pending` requests. ``` Username: @langningchen ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/nmge133479wogs8ccgc84w0scssoco46bzmzmzayqc.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/mvnx4vtp0is4gc4osg0owooww88kcscn44hren96y8.png?nc=1)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://map.naver.com/p?c=15.00,0,0,0,adh&p=G8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg,161.84,10,90,0,0,Float](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmap.naver.com%2Fp%3Fc%3D15.00%2C0%2C0%2C0%2Cadh%26p%3DG8MCOE5tzwznzZPeQ8q6Kg%2C161.84%2C10%2C90%2C0%2C0%2CFloat) ### Comment > 언제부턴가 해당 확장프로그렘이 켜져있을때 > 네이버지도에서 로드뷰를 보려고하면 화면이 멈추고 스크린샷과같이 오류가 뜹니다. > 사이트를 새로고침하거나 해당 프로그램을 비활성화를 하면 정상작동됩니다. > > 처음에는 로드뷰를 쓰기 어려울만큼 버벅임과 로드뷰 화질저화등이 발생했는데 > 이 확장프로그램에서 몇가지 설정 변경 후 화질개선과 버벅거림은 없어졌지만 > 첫 실행시 오류가 뜨는건 바뀌지않아요. > 네이버지도 로드뷰 관련 프로그램을 차단하는거같은데 수정부탁드립니다. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.wunderground.com/dashboard/pws/IKROUN1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wunderground.com%2Fdashboard%2Fpws%2FIKROUN1)

### Comment
> Hello,
> 
> I would like to report a possible false positive or filtering issue with AdGuard DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com).
> 
> When AdGuard DNS is enabled on Android devices, Personal Weather Station (PWS) pages on Weather Underground do not load correctly.
> 
> What I tested:
> 
> Android phones with AdGuard DNS configured as Private DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> Multiple browsers (Chrome and Opera)
> Multiple devices (the issue occurs on more than one Android phone)
> Clearing browser cache and site data did not resolve the issue
> 
> Observed behavior:
> 
> With AdGuard DNS enabled, station pages may either:
> display the station as Offline with no weather data shown, or
> redirect to a 404 Not Found page.
> 
> With AdGuard DNS disabled, the same station pages load correctly and weather data is displayed.
> With AdGuard DNS enabled but traffic routed through a VPN, the same station pages also load correctly.
> 
> The issue appears consistently on multiple devices using AdGuard DNS and disappears immediately when AdGuard DNS is disabled or bypassed through a VPN.
> 
> This suggests that a domain required by Weather Underground may be blocked or filtered by AdGuard DNS.
> 
> Thank you for investigating.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/d904cbqzqc084oc088sg8kok4cco8w0ivt2646w9kg.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8aan3xf8e6ck8oc8o8ssoc8s0oo0cgooiqtwpclkfk.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default
System version: | `Android 16`
Browser: | Opera

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.wunderground.com/dashboard/pws/IKROUN1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wunderground.com%2Fdashboard%2Fpws%2FIKROUN1)

### Comment
> Hello,
> 
> I would like to report a possible false positive or filtering issue with AdGuard DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com).
> 
> When AdGuard DNS is enabled on Android devices, Personal Weather Station (PWS) pages on Weather Underground do not load correctly.
> 
> What I tested:
> 
> Android phones with AdGuard DNS configured as Private DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> Multiple browsers (Chrome and Opera)
> Multiple devices (the issue occurs on more than one Android phone)
> Clearing browser cache and site data did not resolve the issue
> 
> Observed behavior:
> 
> With AdGuard DNS enabled, station pages may either:
> display the station as Offline with no weather data shown, or
> redirect to a 404 Not Found page.
> 
> With AdGuard DNS disabled, the same station pages load correctly and weather data is displayed.
> With AdGuard DNS enabled but traffic routed through a VPN, the same station pages also load correctly.
> 
> The issue appears consistently on multiple devices using AdGuard DNS and disappears immediately when AdGuard DNS is disabled or bypassed through a VPN.
> 
> This suggests that a domain required by Weather Underground may be blocked or filtered by AdGuard DNS.
> 
> Thank you for investigating.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/d904cbqzqc084oc088sg8kok4cco8w0ivt2646w9kg.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8aan3xf8e6ck8oc8o8ssoc8s0oo0cgooiqtwpclkfk.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default
System version: | `Android 16`
Browser: | Opera

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=jp.npbe.npbplus](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Djp.npbe.npbplus) ### Comment > 1. Install and launch NPB Plus app and select any team. > 2. A "最新動画" section will appear in the center; select one and play it. > 3. If you play a video with AdGuard enabled and try to play it in full screen, you will see an error message saying, "インターネット接続状況を確認して再度お試しください," and you will not be able to view the video in full screen. If AdGuard is disabled, the video will start playing in full screen after the advertisement has finished. ### Screenshots

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.wunderground.com/dashboard/pws/IKROUN1](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wunderground.com%2Fdashboard%2Fpws%2FIKROUN1)

### Comment
> Hello,
> 
> I would like to report a possible false positive or filtering issue with AdGuard DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com).
> 
> When AdGuard DNS is enabled on Android devices, Personal Weather Station (PWS) pages on Weather Underground do not load correctly.
> 
> What I tested:
> 
> Android phones with AdGuard DNS configured as Private DNS (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> Multiple browsers (Chrome and Opera)
> Multiple devices (the issue occurs on more than one Android phone)
> Clearing browser cache and site data did not resolve the issue
> 
> Observed behavior:
> 
> With AdGuard DNS enabled, station pages may either:
> display the station as Offline with no weather data shown, or
> redirect to a 404 Not Found page.
> 
> With AdGuard DNS disabled, the same station pages load correctly and weather data is displayed.
> With AdGuard DNS enabled but traffic routed through a VPN, the same station pages also load correctly.
> 
> The issue appears consistently on multiple devices using AdGuard DNS and disappears immediately when AdGuard DNS is disabled or bypassed through a VPN.
> 
> This suggests that a domain required by Weather Underground may be blocked or filtered by AdGuard DNS.
> 
> Thank you for investigating.



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/d904cbqzqc084oc088sg8kok4cco8w0ivt2646w9kg.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/8aan3xf8e6ck8oc8o8ssoc8s0oo0cgooiqtwpclkfk.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

| Information | Value |
|-------------|-------|
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Router
DNS server: | Default
System version: | `Android 16`
Browser: | Opera

issue.body:
# Creating the pull request

> Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed\
> If the related issue does not exist in our repository, please create it before making pull request\
> It is highly recommended to use our [Web Reporting Tool](https://kb.adguard.com/technical-support/reporting-tool) instead of creating an issue on GitHub directly\
> Please note, that we verify every pull request manually, so it may take time to apply it

## Prerequisites

### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms

- [x] This is not an ad/bug report;
- [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project;
- [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes;
- [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure.

## What problem does the pull request fix?

### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section

- [ ] Missed ads or ad leftovers;
- [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly;
- [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website;
- [ ] Missed analytics or tracker;
- [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc;
- [x] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc;
- [ ] Filters maintenance.

## What issue is being fixed?

### Enter the issue address

Fix https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/233620

### Add your comment and screenshots

#### If possible, a screenshot of a page or application should not be cropped too much. Otherwise, it is not always clear where the element is located

0. **DO NOT** upload screenshots with sexually explicit material on GitHub directly.\
 Instead, upload it to a third-party image hosting and post the link to it without preview (!) here.\
 Also, mention if the link leads to NSFW content;

1. Add screenshots of the problem. You can drag and drop images or paste them from clipboard

    Use `<details> </details>` tag to hide screenshots under the spoiler;

2. Describe the issue in detail until it is absolutely clear from the screenshot what the problem is

    You can also indicate any other information that you think the developers should know.

**Warning:** Please remove personal information before uploading screenshots!

1. Your comment

This can only be reproduced when access the website in the Asia region(maybe base on IP)

2. Screenshots

<details>

<summary>Screenshot 1:</summary>

<!-- paste screenshot here -->

</details>

<details>

<summary>Screenshot N:</summary>

<!-- paste screenshot here -->

</details>

### Terms

- [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://store.kde.org/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstore.kde.org%2F) ### Comment > ### 概要 > > タイポスクワッティング機能を有効にするとKDE StoreやOpenDesktop.org等が使用しているドメイン `pling.com` がドメイン `sling.com` にリダイレクトされるのでページ内のアイテムやユーザの画像が全く表示されなくなる > > ### 再現手順 > > 1. タイポスクワッティング機能を有効にする > 2. KDE Store `https://store.kde.org` にアクセスする ``` Username: @Hinaxnitro ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/73vr3n4rbpwcgoggk080kck8ogw0oowg7359i4ml7c.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/dgo2oqnplvcwgwkk0csk80w808wws8wsd8whrsmy6o.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS DNS setup: | Home DNS server: | Private System version: | `Linux (Manjaro unstable)` Browser: | Floorp Blocklists: | **AdGuard:**
AdGuard DNS filter,
AWAvenue Ads Rule,
1Hosts (Lite),
OISD Blocklist Small

Phishing URL Blocklist (PhishTank and OpenPhish),

issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard for Android, AdGuard Browser Extension, AdGuard for Windows, AdGuard Content Blocker, AdGuard DNS ### AdGuard version 2.8.0 but also dns - so that shouldn't really matter ### What type of problem have you encountered? Dangerous site ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome, Firefox, Brave ### Which device do you use? Mobile ### Where is the problem encountered? https://www.karedeutschland.com ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter, EasyList, AdGuard Mobile Ads filter ### Privacy AdGuard Tracking Protection filter, EasyPrivacy, Fanboy's Enhanced Tracking List, Peter Lowe's Blocklist, AdGuard URL Tracking filter ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances EasyList Cookie List, I don't care about cookies, Fanboy's Annoyances, Adblock Warning Removal List, AdGuard Other Annoyances filter, AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter, AdGuard Popups filter, AdGuard Cookie Notices filter, AdGuard Annoyances filter, AdGuard Widgets filter ### Security Online Malicious URL Blocklist, Phishing URL Blocklist, uBlock Origin – Badware risks ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters AdGuard DNS filter ### Language-specific AdGuard German filter, EasyList Germany ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? Send Do-Not-Track signals, Self-destruction of third-party cookies, Block WebRTC, Hide your User-Agent (specify in comment below, if used custom value) ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. karedeutschland.com is a fakeshop impersonating kare.de it does not provide an official imprint while offering some astronomically/unreasonably high discounts. The registrar is in hongkong, all other contacts are hidden because of a private registration but -allegedly- based in china according to whois.com the original kare.de is waaaaayyy more unobfuscared and obviously legitimate. If you'd like to check their details you can do so easily on webwhois.denic.de Every info you need is there - a well known registrar, an official imprint and proper business contacts as opposed to the fakeshop. Karedeutschland.com is by now detected by bitdefender-based security products and netcraft according to virustotal. Karedeutschland.com is primarily an https website but also reachable by http 2. Screenshots I seem to genuinely suck at filling in your template, I'm very sorry 😂 ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.body:
# Creating the pull request

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://store.kde.org/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstore.kde.org%2F) ### Comment > ### 概要 > > タイポスクワッティング機能を有効にするとKDE StoreやOpenDesktop.org等が使用しているドメイン `pling.com` がドメイン `sling.com` にリダイレクトされるのでページ内のアイテムやユーザの画像が全く表示されなくなる > > ### 再現手順 > > 1. タイポスクワッティング機能を有効にする > 2. issue.title: aurorabrand.co.il

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://aurorabrand.co.il/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Faurorabrand.co.il%2F) ### Comment > The domain aurorabrand.co.il is blocked at the DNS level by the AdGuard DNS filter (rule: ||aurorabrand.co.il^), which returns A 0.0.0.0. This makes the entire site unreachable (ERR_ADDRESS_INVALID). > > This is a false positive. aurorabrand.co.il is a legitimate Israeli e-commerce store (copper magnetic jewelry) hosted on Shopify. It is the storefront itself — not a tracking or advertising domain. > > Steps to reproduce: > 1. Enable AdGuard DNS protection with the AdGuard DNS filter active. > 2. Open https://aurorabrand.co.il/ > 3. The site fails to load (DNS resolves to 0.0.0.0). > > The site loads normally when AdGuard DNS protection is disabled. > > Please remove ||aurorabrand.co.il^ from the AdGuard DNS filter. ### Screenshots

issue.title: Fix #233620 www.bloomberg.com
issue.body:
# Creating the pull request

> Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed\
> If the related issue does not exist in our repository, please create it before making pull request\
> It is highly recommended to use our [Web Reporting Tool](https://kb.adguard.com/technical-support/reporting-tool) instead of creating an issue on GitHub directly\
> Please note, that we verify every pull request manually, so it may take time to apply it

## Prerequisites

### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms

- [x] This is not an ad/bug report;
- [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project;
- [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes;
- [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure.

## What problem does the pull request fix?

### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section

- [ ] Missed ads or ad leftovers;
- [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly;
- [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website;
- [ ] Missed analytics or tracker;
- [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc;
- [x] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc;
- [ ] Filters maintenance.

## What issue is being fixed?

### Enter the issue address

Fix https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/233620

### Add your comment and screenshots

#### If possible, a screenshot of a page or application should not be cropped too much. Otherwise, it is not always clear where the element is located

0. **DO NOT** upload screenshots with sexually explicit material on GitHub directly.\
 Instead, upload it to a third-party image hosting and post the link to it without preview (!) here.\
 Also, mention if the link leads to NSFW content;

1. Add screenshots of the problem. You can drag and drop images or paste them from clipboard

    Use `<details> </details>` tag to hide screenshots under the spoiler;

2. Describe the issue in detail until it is absolutely clear from the screenshot what the problem is

    You can also indicate any other information that you think the developers should know.

**Warning:** Please remove personal information before uploading screenshots!

1. Your comment

This can only be reproduced when access the website in the Asia region(maybe base on IP)

2. Screenshots

<details>

<summary>Screenshot 1:</summary>

<!-- paste screenshot here -->

</details>

<details>

<summary>Screenshot N:</summary>

<!-- paste screenshot here -->

</details>

### Terms

- [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

comment.body: The scroll lock mentioned by mu-hun is due to the paywall. You can verify that the cookie-induced scroll lock has been released through the main homepage, not the article itself, and this is what we targeted for removal. This PR focuses on removing cookie pop-ups, not removing the paywall popup.

issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard for Android, AdGuard Browser Extension, AdGuard for Windows, AdGuard Content Blocker, AdGuard DNS ### AdGuard version 2.8.0 but also dns - so that shouldn't really matter ### What type of problem have you encountered? Dangerous site ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome, Firefox, Brave ### Which device do you use? Mobile ### Where is the problem encountered? https://www.karedeutschland.com ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter, EasyList, AdGuard Mobile Ads filter ### Privacy AdGuard Tracking Protection filter, EasyPrivacy, Fanboy's Enhanced Tracking List, Peter Lowe's Blocklist, AdGuard URL Tracking filter ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances EasyList Cookie List, I don't care about cookies, Fanboy's Annoyances, Adblock Warning Removal List, AdGuard Other Annoyances filter, AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter, AdGuard Popups filter, AdGuard Cookie Notices filter, AdGuard Annoyances filter, AdGuard Widgets filter ### Security Online Malicious URL Blocklist, Phishing URL Blocklist, uBlock Origin – Badware risks ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters AdGuard DNS filter ### Language-specific AdGuard German filter, EasyList Germany ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? Send Do-Not-Track signals, Self-destruction of third-party cookies, Block WebRTC, Hide your User-Agent (specify in comment below, if used custom value) ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. karedeutschland.com is a fakeshop impersonating kare.de it does not provide an official imprint while offering some astronomically/unreasonably high discounts. The registrar is in hongkong, all other contacts are hidden because of a private registration but -allegedly- based in china according to whois.com the original kare.de is waaaaayyy more unobfuscared and obviously legitimate. If you'd like to check their details you can do so easily on webwhois.denic.de Every info you need is there - a well known registrar, an official imprint and proper business contacts as opposed to the fakeshop. Karedeutschland.com is by now detected by bitdefender-based security products and netcraft according to virustotal. Karedeutschland.com is primarily an https website but also reachable by http 2. Screenshots I seem to genuinely suck at filling in your template, I'm very sorry 😂 ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition
